summary: Tested 3 new features: verified contractor email functions, admin revoke verified modal, and crew push notification widget. All 6 backend tests passed. Frontend UI tests confirmed all components render and function correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: payment_routes.py line 94-102: Dead code after return statement in validate_coupon() - unreachable PayPal token fetch code should be removed
admin_routes.py list_users: When role filter is passed AND admin role check runs, the query['role'] gets overwritten to {'$ne': 'super_admin'} losing the role filter for regular admins
seed_data_creation: Created testcrew@thedaylaborers.com / Crew@1234 for crew UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features verified: (1) /api/payments/verified-contractor/fee returns {fee:39.99}, (2) Admin revoke verified PUT stores revoke_note and verified_revoked_at in DB, re-grant also works, (3) Push notify widget appears in crew dashboard sidebar with data-testid='push-notify-widget' - enable/disable btns only show when browser has permission (hidden when blocked, which is expected). Email functions send_verified_contractor_email and send_revoke_verified_email both exist. contractor1@test.com is_verified_contractor=true after re-grant in backend tests. Crew test user: testcrew@thedaylaborers.com / Crew@1234
